event.message: New instance of BPEL process "1.0" initiated (# "SendWOTChanges").

event.label: CapturePutProjectsFault
event.details: <vFeedMessage><vFeedMessage xmlns:def="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xsi:type="def:string" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">PutProjects failed: http=null; fault=REST fault in putProjects</vFeedMessage></vFeedMessage>

event.label: InvokeUpdateFeedStatus
event.message: Started invocation of operation "update" on partner "UpdateWOTSewerAIData".

event.label: InvokeUpdateFeedStatus
event.message: Faulted while invoking operation "update" on provider "UpdateWOTSewerAIData".
event.details: 4SKq65mwH0mPi5ECpdbUxQ==ERROR 0Exception occurred when binding was invoked. Exception occurred during invocation of JCA binding: "JCA Binding execute of Reference operation 'update' failed due to: Could not create/access the TopLink Session. This session is used to connect to the datastore. Caused by BINDING.JCA-11625 Descriptor Not Found Exception. Could not find Descriptor [class UpdateWOTSewerAIData.EpseweraiWotStg1] for [oracle.tip.adapter.db.DBWriteInteractionSpec@3938f96e] inside of mappings xml file: [UpdateWOTSewerAIData-or-mappings.xml]. This descriptor contains meta-data for mapping one Xml record to one relational schema/table and is a key into the toplink mappings xml file. You may have changed the descriptorName info in either the _db.jca or toplink-mappings.xml files so that they no longer match. Make sure that the descriptor name in the activation/interactionSpec and in the Mappings.xml file match. . You may need to configure the connection settings in the deployment descriptor (i.e. DbAdapter.rar#META-INF/weblogic-ra.xml) and restart the server. This exception is considered not retriable, likely due to a modelling mistake. ". The invoked JCA adapter raised a resource exception. Please examine the above error message carefully to determine a resolution. nullDescriptor Not Found Exception. Could not find Descriptor [class UpdateWOTSewerAIData.EpseweraiWotStg1] for [oracle.tip.adapter.db.DBWriteInteractionSpec@3938f96e] inside of mappings xml file: [UpdateWOTSewerAIData-or-mappings.xml]. This descriptor contains meta-data for mapping one Xml record to one relational schema/table and is a key into the toplink mappings xml file. You may have changed the descriptorName info in either the _db.jca or toplink-mappings.xml files so that they no longer match. Make sure that the descriptor name in the activation/interactionSpec and in the Mappings.xml file match. 0

You may have changed the descriptorName info in either the _db.jca or toplink-mappings.xml files so that they no longer match. Make sure that the descriptor name in the activation/interactionSpec and in the Mappings.xml file match. 0

event.message: "BPELFault" has not been caught by a catch block.

The caller handled the fault and commited the transaction, the instance did not reach dehydration point because of an unhandled fault. bpel engine saved the audit trail for the bpel instance "2292183".
